## Problem

<!-- One or two sentences. The smaller and more focused, the better. -->

## Alternatives considered

## Scope check

miru aims to stay a small, focused viewer. Before opening, please confirm:

- [ ] This is a viewer feature, not an editor / file manager feature.
- [ ] It does not require new network destinations beyond `miru update`.
- [ ] It does not add a plugin / extension system.

If the feature falls outside the above, please describe why miru is the right place for it (vs. an external tool).
